titleStmt.title: SII 29.148: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 148. (A.R. No. B. 630 of 1961-62.) KERAVASE, KARKALA TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab setup in the Mahālingēśvara temple.

It records the grant of several lands for offerings during Ushā-pūje to the god and various services in the temple of Mahādēva by Timmaya sēnabōva and his sons when Vira Pānḍyappaoḍeya was ruling the kingdom from the capital Keravase.
The record is dated Śaka 1468, Parābhava, Mēśha 15, Sunday corresponding to 1546 A.D., April 11, Sunday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiracuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhā
ya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣa 1468 neya parābha
va saṁvatsarada mēṣamāsa 15 Ādivāradalu śrīmatu Arirāyagaṁḍara dāva
ṇi śrī vīra pāṁḍyappa Oḍeyaru keravaseyali sthirarājyadalū sthirapaṭṭavanāḷu
va kāladalu keravaseya mahādēvara saṁnidhiyalū keravaseya baraha
da kāśyapa gōtrada tiṁmayya sēnabōvanu Uṣāpūje naivēdyakke pāda
mūlārthavāgi dārāpūrvvakavāgi koṭṭa Akki staḷada vivara naṁma braṁhādāyada
kaṁṇa mūḍara beṭṭina bāgila gadeyiṁ teṁka paḍuvaṇa beṭṭu bittuva bīja
1 kaṁ . hariya makkida bayalalū teṁkaṇa hoyige gaddeyiṁ baḍagaṇa
. kha 13 teṁkaṇa beṭṭina gadde 2 kkaṁ kha 2 sekuṁjada bayala mēlaṇa beṭati
maru kha 3kke Aṁtu bīja kha 12 kaṁ naivēdyakke beḷatige Akki pratidina Oṁ
dakkaṁ Akki hāne 1 moḷanuddada tuṁbe hūvina māle bilvapatre vīḷaya pratidina
gaḷalū naḍasuvanu gaṁdake harḷe 1 dīptige yeḷeṁṇe hāne 1 paḍuva beṭṭina
lu paḍuvabe bāḷa bittuva bīja kha 2 kaṁ Amavase 12 ke naivēdyakke Akki hāne 12
varuṣa 1 sōmavārada Akki naivēdyakke Akki hāge 24 yigaddeyalū namage
koṭṭadu teṟu hā 24 naivēdyakke kaṭaṇi beṭṭinalu naḍubeṭṭu niṁtipaḷi baḷiya
heggaḍeyiṁ dattakke biṭṭa beṭṭu bayalu bittuva bīja kha 6 kaṁ Akki
kha (1) bhāradvāja gōtrada rāmacaṁdra bhaṭṭariṁ kha 1 jāmadadyanavagō
trada rāyasta tiṁmeyya sēnabōvarū Ā rāmacaṁdra bhaṭṭara svāsteyalli ho(ṁ)
na koṭu kaṭida kha 3 vasiṣṭa gōtrada padumarasara svāsteyalū dēmakka honakoṭu kaṭida
kha 1 padumaka jakiya kruṣṇa niṁ kha 2 Aṁtu Akki kha 12 kkaṁ pratidinagaḷalū
hāne 1 titiyalū naḍasibaharu yīdharmava saṁtāna pāraṁpareyāgi naḍasuvanu
A kāśyapa gōtrada tiṁme sēnabōvara makkaḷu viṭharasa sēnabōva gaṁgaṇa sēna
bōvanu mahādēvara naivēdyakke pādamūli mādhage dhārāpūrvakavāgi koṭṭa
Akke staḷada vivara Ā rāmacaṁdra bhaṭṭara svāsviya paḍuvaṇa beṭṭu bittuva
bīja kha 6 sekuṁjada bayala mūḍa bedi timaru kha 3 Utimagāla ke
ḷagaṇa hala bi gaṇa kha 1 Aṁtu bīja kha 10 bayala kereya Aruḷi kruṣṇa
niṁ maṁgarasara beṭige Aki kha 2 mūḍe kajakeyalu Aruḷigeṁṇanavariṁ
da kha 3 yiṁdapaḷiya kommeyiṁ seṭi june Akki ha 24 giḷipaḷi baḷiya
hā 6 . hilaṇana pāṁḍiyara sekuṁjada bayalalū kha 3 A
ṁtu Akki kha 9 bittuva bīja kha 10 ra sthaḷake saha pratidinavoṁdake A
ki hā ralekadali naḍasi baha dharmma svāsteya liṁda naḍeva
trayōdaśigaḷalu pradōṣa pūje naivēdyakke Akki hā 1

ke Aki vīḷya tuṁbe hūvinamāle bilvada tekkeṁpina hū
vinamāle māru 12 brāhmaṇa bōjana ja 1kke Akki hā
ne 1 tuppa kuḍute Aki hālu mēlōgara Uppinakāyi vīḷeya
dele 1 kke 3 hā 4 kke Akki hā 24 tuppa ku 12 brāhmaṇa bhōjanakke Akki
hā 10 tuppa kuḍite 12 Aṁtu Akki hā 48 tuppa ku 25 yipūjeya naḍa
suvanu śivarātri raṁga pūjege periyaḍukada hoyi
ge gaddeyiṁ mūḍa nāgaṇa bittu bīja hā 20 kkaṁ Akki kha 1 ke naivē
dyake hā 4 Udina kaḍubige hā 6 tuppa kuḍite 1 Akki hā 2 naṁdige
pusuvare kaiyaṁṇe ku 1 ke hā 2 teṁginatāre(yi) bāḷehaṁṇu 10 A
ḍake 20 yele 100 kke saha hā 5 dīptige teṁginayeṁṇe ku 10 Akki
hā 11 Aṁtu Akki kha 1 . dānapālaneyōrmmadhye dānāchrēyōnrupālanaṁ
dānātsarggamavāpnōti pālanādacutaṁpadaṁ . svadattāṁ dviguṇaṁ pu
ṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ paradattāharēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . dē
vē brāhmaṇyarūpasvaṁ balādapi hataṁti yadyapi pauruṣa sahasrā
ṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . Ārobarū yidharmake tapi
dare yēḷu ghaṭṭadaliḷida yettina dōṣa gōbrāhmara vāraṇāsi
yalu vadhisida dōṣa .
Digital edition of SII 29.148 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
